name: Netlify Forms
description: Add a signup form powered by Netlify Forms with spam protection via honeypot field. No server-side code required.

packageFileDescriptions.src/routes/form-example.tsx: Form example route (/form-example): Netlify Forms signup with honeypot spam protection.
packageFileDescriptions.public/form-example.html: Static HTML form declaration for Netlify Forms; name, email, bot-field.
